page.missing_id: No project id was provided in the URL.
page.scan_already_active: A scan is already running for this project — open the in-progress drawer to view it.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this project.
errors.unknown: Could not load this project. Please try again.

filter.search_placeholder: Search by SPDX ID or name

empty.title: No compliance findings yet
empty.description: Run a scan to populate license inventory and obligations for this project.

eol_chip.title: {{count}} component(s) past end-of-life
eol_chip.body: End-of-life releases receive no upstream fixes — a future Critical CVE will have no patch.

risk_card.title: Risk score
risk_card.subtitle: Computed from {{total}} component(s) in the latest scan.
risk_card.vuln_data_empty_title: No vulnerability data at scan time
risk_card.vuln_data_empty_body: The vulnerability database was empty when this scan ran, so 0 CVEs means data was missing — not that the project is safe. Re-scan once the NVD mirror has finished loading.

severity_card.title: Vulnerability severity
severity_card.subtitle: Components grouped by their highest CVE severity.
severity_card.subtitle_findings: Findings grouped by their own severity.

recent_scans.title: Recent scans
recent_scans.subtitle: Last five scans for this project.
recent_scans.empty: No scans have been recorded yet.

gate_card.title: Build gate
gate_card.subtitle: Build-blocking verdict from the latest successful scan.
gate_card.no_scan_detail: Run a successful scan to evaluate the build gate.
gate_card.pass_detail: No critical CVEs or forbidden licenses block this build.
gate_card.error_title: Could not load the build gate

reason.fallback: The build gate failed. See the metrics below for details.

errors.not_found: This project no longer exists or you no longer have access to it.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this project's build gate.
errors.unknown: Could not load the build gate. Please try again.

outdated_chip.title: {{count}} component(s) behind latest patch
outdated_chip.body: A newer patch is available on the same release line — still supported, just not current.

components.summary_scope_filtered: {{count}} dev/test components excluded by the runtime-scope filter
components.vulns_link_aria: View {{count}} CVEs for {{name}} in the Vulnerabilities tab

eol.label: EOL
eol.tooltip: This release cycle is past its published end-of-life (endoflife.date) — no more upstream fixes.
eol.tooltip_with_date: End-of-life since {{date}} (endoflife.date) — no more upstream fixes.

state.unknown: Tracked product, but the release cycle could not be determined
state.untracked: Not a product tracked by endoflife.date

currency.label: Outdated
currency.tooltip: A newer patch is available in this release line — this version is behind the latest patch.
currency.tooltip_with_version: Latest patch {{version}} is available — this version is behind it.

state.current: On the latest patch in its release line
state.outdated: Behind the latest patch in its release line
state.unknown: Tracked, but the latest patch could not be determined
state.untracked: No release-line data available for this component

dependency_type.aria_unknown: Dependency type unknown — this scan has no dependency graph

dependency_scope.aria_unknown: Usage not specified by this scan

empty.title: No components match
empty.subtitle: Adjust the filters or trigger a new scan.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this component.
errors.unknown: Could not load this component. Please try again.

vulns.title: Vulnerabilities ({{count}})
vulns.empty: No known vulnerabilities for this component.

obligations.title: Obligations ({{count}})
obligations.empty: No obligations recorded for this component's licenses.

upgrade_cluster.no_fix_reason: Some CVEs have no fix version yet
upgrade_cluster.unparseable_reason: Fix version could not be parsed

empty.title: No upgrades to show
empty.subtitle: There are no open findings, or no scan has succeeded yet.

remediation.heading: Remediation
remediation.subheading: Preview proposed npm version bumps for this project and, when authorised, open a remediation pull request.

column.title: Title
column.affected_more_count_tooltip: {{count}} more component(s) also affected — see drawer

tooltip.reachable: The vulnerable code is reachable on this project's call graph — prioritize this finding.
tooltip.unreachable: An analyzer ran and proved the vulnerable code is not reachable in this project.
tooltip.unknown: Reachability has not been analyzed for this finding.

reachability.tooltip_filter: Filter findings by whether the vulnerable code is reachable on this project's call graph.

epss.tooltip: EPSS — probability this CVE is exploited in the wild within 30 days. Complements CVSS (severity).
epss.empty: No EPSS data for this CVE

kev.label: KEV
kev.tooltip: Listed in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog — exploitation in the wild has been confirmed.
kev.tooltip_with_due: Listed in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog — exploitation in the wild has been confirmed. CISA remediation due date: {{date}}.

filter.minEpssHint: Enter an EPSS probability between 0 and 1 to keep findings at or above it.

vex.marker_tooltip: This finding's status was set by an imported VEX document.
vex.import_role_gated: Importing a VEX document requires a team admin role.
vex.import_description: Upload an OpenVEX or CycloneDX VEX document to auto-transition matching findings. The format is detected automatically.
vex.import_error_forbidden: You don't have permission to import VEX for this project. A team admin role is required.
vex.import_error_not_found: Project not found or not accessible.
vex.import_error_too_large: The VEX document is too large to import.
vex.import_error_malformed: The document could not be parsed as OpenVEX or CycloneDX VEX.
vex.import_error_generic: The VEX import failed. Please try again.

bulk.select_all_aria: Select all findings on this page
bulk.no_common_target: The selected findings have no status they can all transition to. Narrow the selection to findings in compatible statuses.

toolbar.search_placeholder: Search by CVE ID, summary, or component

empty.title: No vulnerabilities match
empty.subtitle: Adjust the filters or wait for the next scan.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this vulnerability.
errors.unknown: Could not load this vulnerability. Please try again.

drawer.subtitle: Status: {{status}}
drawer.summary_empty: No summary available for this finding.
drawer.affected_empty: No affected components linked to this finding.

upgrade_reason.no_fix_version: No recommendation: at least one open CVE for this component has no known fix version.
upgrade_reason.unparseable_version: No recommendation: the available fix versions could not be parsed.

drawer.justification_placeholder: Explain why this finding moves to its new status.
drawer.actions_empty: No transitions available from the current status.
drawer.role_gated_tooltip: Suppression requires the team admin role.

errors.conflict: This finding was updated by someone else. Reload to see the latest state.

distribution.title: License distribution
distribution.subtitle: Components grouped by the licenses they carry in the latest scan.
distribution.empty: No license findings to chart yet.

toolbar.search_placeholder: Search by SPDX ID or name

description.behavioral_use: Behavioral-use restriction (RAIL/OpenRAIL and the Llama, Gemma, and Falcon community licenses). A human must review whether the use-based terms apply to your use.
description.non_commercial: Non-commercial terms (CC-BY-NC and similar). A human must confirm the use qualifies as non-commercial or is otherwise permitted.

empty.title: No license findings
empty.description: Run a scan to populate license data.

filtered.title: No matches
filtered.description: No licenses match the current filters.

drawer.title: License details
drawer.subtitle: Kind: {{kind}}

review.title: AI review flag
review.disclaimer: This flag surfaces the restriction class only. Whether it applies to your use is a human/legal judgement.

ort_match.unparseable: ORT match data is not in a renderable format.

drawer.affected_truncated: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} components. Open the Components tab to see the full list.

toolbar.search_placeholder: Search by SPDX, license name, kind, or text…

empty.title: No obligations recorded
empty.description: The project's latest scan does not surface any catalog obligations. Run a scan or seed a license catalog to populate this view.

errors.load_list: Could not load the obligation list.

drawer.title: Obligation: {{kind}}
drawer.subtitle: Attached to {{license}}

affected.empty: No affected components in the latest scan.

drawer.affected_truncated: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} components. Open the Components tab to see the full list.
drawer.text_truncated: Obligation text was truncated by the server. See the source catalog for the complete text.

sbom.title: Software Bill of Materials
sbom.subtitle: Download the SBOM for the latest scan in CycloneDX or SPDX.
sbom.no_scan_yet: No scan has been recorded yet. Trigger a scan to generate an SBOM.

signature.title: Signature & verification
signature.subtitle: Download everything needed to verify this project's signed SBOM offline with cosign.
signature.not_applicable: {{artifact}} is only available for keyless (sigstore) signing. For key-based signing, verify with the public key instead.
signature.unsigned: The latest scan has no signature. SBOM signing may be disabled, or this scan was not signed.
signature.verify_hint: The bundle includes a VERIFY.md with step-by-step cosign verify-blob instructions.

hint.default: The canonical SBOM. This is the only export that carries a cosign signature.
hint.profiled: Applies your team's license policy. Profile exports are not signed.

empty.title: No preserved source for this scan
empty.description: This scan did not keep a copy of the analysed source files. Re-scan the project to enable the source file viewer.

viewer.no_selection: Select a file in the tree to view its source and license matches.
viewer.binary: Binary file — preview is not available.
viewer.truncated: This file was truncated to fit the viewer. Download it to see the full contents.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.subtitle: Update project metadata or archive the project.

errors.name_max: Name must be 100 characters or less
errors.description_max: Description must be 500 characters or less
errors.git_url_invalid: Must be a valid URL (https:// or http://)
errors.default_branch_max: Default branch must be 255 characters or less

git_credential.title: Git credential (private repository)
git_credential.help: Tokens are stored encrypted and used to clone private https repositories. SSH URLs need key material, which is not supported here yet.

archive.active_subtitle: Archived projects are hidden from listings but their scan history is preserved.
archive.archived_subtitle: This project is archived. Restore it to resume scanning.
archive.confirm: Archiving will hide this project from listings. Continue?

releases.title: Versions
releases.subtitle: Each successful scan is a version snapshot. Open one to view that snapshot's full picture.
releases.empty: No successful scans yet — run a scan to create a version snapshot.

errors.load_failed: Could not load versions. Please try again.

release_switcher.latest_hint: Live view of the latest successful scan

waive.dialog_description: Allow {{component}} past the build gate despite its {{spdx_id}} license. This affects only this component.
waive.reason_placeholder: Why is this license acceptable for this component?
waive.reason_hint: A reason is required and is kept as the audit record for this waiver.
waive.expires_hint: Leave empty for a waiver that never expires.
waive.expires_required_hint: A forbidden license can only be waived temporarily — set an expiry date.
waive.role_gated: Only team admins can waive a license.
waive.no_purl: This component has no package URL to scope a waiver to.
waive.error_forbidden: You do not have permission to waive licenses for this team.
waive.error_malformed: The waiver was rejected — check the reason and try again.
waive.error_generic: Could not update the waiver. Please try again.

compare.title: Compare versions
compare.subtitle: See what changed between two version snapshots.
compare.open_button_aria: Compare the two most recent versions
compare.open_disabled_hint: Need at least two successful scans

missing_params.title: Pick two versions to compare
missing_params.description: Select a base and a target version above to see what changed.

licenses.title: Licenses
licenses.introduced_aria: Target introduces a {{category}} license the base did not have.

empty.title: No differences between these versions.
empty.description: These two snapshots have the same components, vulnerabilities, and licenses.

compare.truncated: Some lists were capped at 1000 items.

errors.title: Could not load the comparison
errors.not_found: One of the selected versions could not be found. It may have been removed.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to compare this project's versions.
errors.unknown: Could not load the comparison. Please try again.

generate.heading: Generate
generate.subheading: Generate or export a project artefact. Each shortcut opens the domain tab where the action lives.

sbom.heading: SBOM downloads
sbom.subheading: Download a CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM for the latest scan, along with its signature and verification bundle.

notice.title: NOTICE
notice.description: Attribution NOTICE file with license obligations.

sbom.title: SBOM
sbom.description: Software Bill of Materials in CycloneDX or SPDX.

vuln-pdf.title: Vulnerability PDF
vuln-pdf.description: Risk report with severity / license distribution and CVE list.

vex.title: VEX
vex.description: Export or import VEX statements for the project's findings.

history.heading: Recent activity
history.subheading: Downloads and exports for this project, newest first.

empty.title: No downloads yet.
empty.body: Use the shortcuts on the left to generate a NOTICE, SBOM, vulnerability PDF, or VEX export.

errors.unavailable: Reports are unavailable for this project.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests — please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Could not load the report history. Please try again.

dependency_graph.empty: No dependency graph is available for this scan.
dependency_graph.truncated: This dependency graph has {{count}} nodes, over the {{cap}} limit, so it can't be drawn. Use the Table view to browse components.
dependency_graph.tooLarge: This graph has {{count}} nodes, over the {{cap}} render limit. Showing the dependency tree instead.
dependency_graph.noEdges: This scan recorded no dependency relationships, so the components are listed as a flat tree.

legend.hint: Click a node for details. Type to highlight matching packages.

errors.load_failed: Could not load the dependency graph.
errors.render_failed: Could not render the dependency graph.
